Article Title: Divers to search reefs for rallyist
Article Text: CHANDIGARH: The search and rescue operation for ace Indian rally driver Hari Singh, 59, continued for a second day on Friday with rescuers now confining their efforts to a section of coral reefs near Vaavu Atoll in the Maldives where the speedboat mishap occurred on Thursday, reports Sukhmani Kooner.Specialised dive teams will look for them on Sunday.Hari Singh's son, who had rushed to the Maldives to oversee the rescue efforts, is returning to India to be with his mother and sister. Singh's close friends have stayed back in the Maldives and are coordinating with Maldivian authorities and the Maritime Rescue Coordination Centre. Colleagues, friends and batchmates are in shock. Raj Kapoor, director of Federation of Motor Sports Clubs of India, said Singh was exceptional, be it as a champion driver or his transition to his role in the JK Tyre Motorsport programme.
Article Summary: Rally driver hari singh, 59, is missing in the maldives. The search and rescue operation continues for a second day. Colleagues, friends and batchmates are in shock. Singh's son is returning to india to be with his mother and sister.

Article Title: Nfl Free Agency: NFL Free Agency: Tampa Bay Buccaneers suffer blow as 3-time All-Pro heads to Philadelphia Eagles
Article Text:
NFL Free Agency: Tampa Bay Buccaneers suffer blow as 3-time All-Pro heads to Philadelphia Eagles (Getty)

Philadelphia Eagles add J.T. Gray as Tampa Bay Buccaneers lose key special teams piece in free agency



Tampa Bay’s special teams concerns grow after latest exit

The Tampa Bay Buccaneers entered NFL free agency needing answers on special teams. Instead, they lost one of the few players who could fix that unit. The exit of a proven All-Pro now raises fresh concern inside a team that already struggled in key phases last season.This move also underlines how quickly things shift in NFL free agency. While Tampa Bay looks to rebuild, the Philadelphia Eagles quietly added experience and reliability to a roster chasing another deep playoff run.The Philadelphia Eagles agreed to terms with veteran safety and special teams standout J.T. Gray on March 20, 2026. NFL Network insider Ian Rapoport reported the news on X, confirming a one-year deal. The signing came as part of a broader reshuffle that also included adding safety Marcus Epps.“The Eagles have agreed to terms with safeties Marcus Epps and J.T. Gray, both of whom get one-year deals, after trading S Sydney Brown to the Falcons,” NFL Network’s Ian Rapoport wrote on his X account on Friday. “Epps spent 2019-2022 in Philly, while Gray has been an All-Pro three times.”Gray brings serious credentials. He earned first-team All-Pro honors in 2021 and second-team selections in 2019 and 2024. Across his career, he built a reputation as one of the league’s most consistent special teams players.He racks up tackles, covers ground fast, and rarely misses assignments.For the Eagles, this is a low-risk move with clear upside. They value depth, especially on special teams, where playoff games often turn on it. Gray fits that system well. His experience gives Philadelphia another steady option in tight situations.For the Tampa Bay Buccaneers, this loss hits harder than it may look on paper. The team struggled badly on special teams in 2025. Head coach Todd Bowles admitted late in the season that the staff preferred touchbacks over coverage plays. He said this during a media availability in December 2025, pointing to a lack of trust in tackling.That context makes Gray’s departure more concerning. Tampa Bay signed him to the practice squad on Nov. 21, 2025, ahead of a Week 12 loss to the Los Angeles Rams. Even in a short stint, he offered stability to a unit that lacked it all year.Now, the Buccaneers head deeper into NFL free agency with the same problem still unresolved. Meanwhile, the Eagles move forward with another proven piece. It may not grab headlines like a star quarterback deal, but this is the kind of move that often shows its value in January.
Article Summary: J.t. Gray joins the philadelphia eagles on a one-year deal. Gray was an all-pro three times, including in 2021 and 2024. The tampa bay buccaneers signed him to the practice squad in 2025. The eagles added safety marcus epps as part of a broader reshuffle.

Article Title: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo leave Milwaukee Bucks? $3.6-rich team owner gives surprising update
Article Text:
Giannis Antetokounmpo. Image via: Stacy Revere/ Getty Images

Milwaukee Bucks co-owner Wes Edens details Giannis Antetokounmpo's fate with the franchise



Giannis Antetokounmpo this season: Stats, injury and more



The future of Giannis Antetokounmpo with the Milwaukee Bucks has entered a decisive phase. Clarity is now emerging from ownership even as uncertainty lingers across the league. After years of speculation, the franchise has now outlined a firm direction regarding its two-time MVP, placing the spotlight on what comes next.That clarity arrived through co-owner Wes Edens, who addressed the situation in detail. As Antetokounmpo approaches the final year of his contract, the Bucks appear unwilling to let the situation drift. The decision, according to ownership, will hinge on a single factor. Whether their franchise cornerstone commits to a long-term future in Milwaukee.Wes Edens who has an astonishing $3.6 billion net worth (per Celebrity Net Worth), laid out the team’s stance without hesitation.“Giannis is going into the last year [of his contract],” he said. “So one of two things will happen: Either he will be extended or he'll be traded,” Edens told ESPN.He continued, “The likelihood you'll let him just kind of play out the last year, we can't afford that. It's not consistent with what's good for the organization. That's not a Giannis issue. That's any player that's in their last year.”Milwaukee plans to avoid entering a season with uncertainty around its biggest star.Antetokounmpo is eligible for a four-year, $275 million extension, a deal that could define the franchise’s direction for years.Still, league insiders suggest the path may not be as simple. Questions remain about the team’s internal structure, where decision-making involves multiple stakeholders, including co-owner Jimmy Haslam. One source described the situation by saying, “This has nothing to do with Giannis and whether he asks out,” while adding, “It's about who's making the decision on whether to trade Giannis, and I don't think anyone knows that. ”Antetokounmpo has also maintained a measured stance. “As of today, I'm a Milwaukee Buck and I'm committed to that,” he said earlier in the season. “Now what happens if things move and change in the future? That change, I can't control that.”Despite the uncertainty, Antetokounmpo’s on-court production has been strong. He is averaging 27.6 points and 9.8 rebounds while shooting 62.4 percent from the field, numbers that reflect his continued dominance.His season, however, has not been without challenges. Injuries have interrupted his rhythm, including issues with his calf, groin, knee, and ankle. A recent knee concern also sparked discussions within the organization about whether to shut him down, though the player has shown a desire to return as long as there is no added risk.Milwaukee sits outside the playoff picture, trailing for a play-in spot in the Eastern Conference. Around the league, interest continues to build. Several teams are preparing for the possibility that one of the NBA’s most impactful players could become available.
Article Summary: The future of giannis antetokounmpo with the milwaukee bucks has entered a decisive phase. Co-owner wes edens said that either he will be extended or he'll be traded. The decision will hinge on whether the franchise cornerstone commits to a long-term future in milwaukee.

Article Title: Mark Davis: 70-year-old Raiders' billionaire owner Mark Davis goes public with 38-year-old Dr. Alexandria Lightning, who just became a mom
Article Text:
Las Vegas Raiders owner Mark Davis (Getty Images)

Mark Davis’ new relationship grabs spotlight as Raiders owner steps out with 38-year-old doctor girlfriend

Mark Davis rarely lets his private life spill into public view, but this week the Las Vegas Raiders owner found himself at the center of a very different kind of spotlight. The 70-year-old executive appeared in a series of social media photos alongside Dr. Alexandria Lightning, a 38-year-old entrepreneur, during what looked like an intimate birthday dinner in the Las Vegas suburbs. The images did not take long to travel.Lightning’s post added a personal layer that made the moment feel less like rumor and more like confirmation. “What a wonderful birthday celebration this year. And my first one as a mother,” she wrote, pairing the message with a photo of her newborn son, Maverick Alexander Lightning, born Feb.22. Davis, seated beside her and smiling, seemed at ease in a setting far removed from boardrooms and draft meetings.The timing explains much of the intrigue. Alexander Lightning had only recently shared news of her child’s birth, and the identity of the father has not been publicly disclosed. Within days, the dinner photos surfaced, linking her with one of the NFL’s most recognizable owners for the first time. There has been no official comment from Davis or the Raiders, and Lightning has not responded to media inquiries.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Still, the images themselves carry weight. Davis, who inherited the franchise from his father Al Davis in 2011, has long kept his personal affairs guarded. That discretion has often fueled speculation, especially when he has been seen with younger companions in the past. Yet he has rarely addressed any of it directly.Lightning brings her own profile into the mix. A business owner in the hormone therapy space, she presents herself as an advocate for holistic wellness and has built a sizable following online. Her birthday post, which blended celebration with a glimpse into new motherhood, felt candid rather than staged. That authenticity may be why it resonated so widely.For the Raiders, the moment arrives at an interesting juncture. The franchise is preparing for a pivotal offseason, armed with the No. 1 pick in the upcoming NFL Draft. Davis has remained a visible figure around the team, focused on football matters, even as his personal life briefly becomes a talking point.Whether this public glimpse signals something more enduring is unclear. Davis has not confirmed a relationship, and those close to the situation have stayed quiet. But for now, a single evening, shared online, has shifted the conversation, if only for a moment, away from football and into something more personal.
Article Summary: Mark davis, 70, was seen with 38-year-old dr. alexandria lightning. Lightning recently gave birth to her first child, maverick alexander lightning. Davis has not confirmed a relationship, and those close to the situation have stayed quiet.

Article Title: Nfl Trade Rumors: NFL Trade Rumors: Patrick Mahomes' Kansas City Chiefs emerge as landing spot for former Saints $10M pass rusher
Article Text:
NFL Trade Rumors: Patrick Mahomes' Kansas City Chiefs emerge as landing spot for former Saints $10M pass rusher (Getty Images)

Kansas City Chiefs eye veteran edge help as Cam Jordan rumors heat up

The Kansas City Chiefs are not done yet. After a disappointing 6-11 season and an unexpected crisis surrounding Patrick Mahomes ' ACL and LCL injury, they reshaped parts of the roster in free agency. Now, fresh trade updates suggest another move could be coming. This time, the focus shifts to a proven edge rusher who continues to produce at a high level.As chatter grows, Cam Jordan has emerged as a serious option. A post from a popular NFL Rumours channel claimed the Chiefs are a “strong destination” for the veteran. The timing makes sense given Kansas City’s need for pass rush help.The connection is not random. The New Orleans Saints parted ways with Jordan after the 2025 season, where he still delivered 10.5 sacks and 15 quarterback hits.For a 15-year veteran, those numbers stand out. They also highlight why teams like Kansas City are paying attention. The Chiefs already made smart moves this offseason. They added defensive depth instead of chasing expensive stars. However, one gap remains clear. They need a reliable edge rusher opposite George Karlaftis. That is where Jordan fits perfectly.There is also internal interest. Chris Jones hinted at the idea by posting Jordan’s name on X last week.That kind of public push often signals locker room approval. It matters, especially in a system led by Steve Spagnuolo, where experienced defenders thrive.The Kansas City Chiefs still have around $10 million in cap space. According to ESPN’s report on March 20, 2026, the team can free up more money by restructuring contracts. That flexibility keeps them in play for a veteran like Cam Jordan, who is expected to command a deal in that range.The move also aligns with their broader strategy. The Chiefs traded Trent McDuffie to gain draft capital and financial room. They signed role players like Khyiris Tonga and Alohi Gilman to build depth. Adding Jordan would bring balance by giving them a proven game-changer. Of course, this is still part of the ongoing Cam Jordan trade rumours. Nothing is final. But the fit feels natural. The Chiefs need pressure on the quarterback. Jordan still delivers it.If Kansas City pulls this off, it will not just be another signing. It could be the move that fixes a key weakness and puts them back in contention.
Article Summary: Kansas city chiefs eye veteran edge help as cam jordan rumors heat up. Chiefs still have around $10 million in cap space. According to espn’s report on march 20, 2026, the team can free up more money by restructuring contracts. The move also aligns with their broader strategy.

Article Title: IPL 2026: 5 sixes, 9 fours! KKR's 21-year-old blasts brutal ton, rivals on alert
Article Text:
Angkrish Raghuvanshi (Image credit: KKR)

Watch Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory

NEW DELHI: Young batter Angkrish Raghuvanshi has given Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) management and head coach Abhishek Nayar a welcome selection headache with his explosive hitting in a pre-season intra-squad match at Eden Gardens on Friday.Batting at No. 3, the 21-year-old smashed a stunning unbeaten 103 off just 55 balls, an innings laced with nine fours and five sixes, at a strike rate of 187.27. His knock powered Purple Knights to a successful chase of 200 in 19.2 overs.Three-time IPL champions KKR will begin their IPL 2026 campaign against Mumbai Indians on March 29 at the Wankhede Stadium.With multiple opening options and a revamped squad, Nayar admitted that finalising the right combinations remains KKR’s biggest challenge ahead of the season.Having overhauled their squad after a disappointing 2025 campaign, KKR have added big names such as Cameron Green, Finn Allen Tim Seifert and Rachin Ravindra, but are yet to lock in their batting order."I'm terrible at predicting what can go wrong, but I can just tell you, I don't know how the tournament will pan out, but I think initially, it's making sure we get a fit playing XI come (March) 29th," Nayar said during the team’s first media interaction of the season.KKR, who finished eighth last year with just five wins, are also set to field a new opening combination in the absence of Rahmanullah Gurbaz and Quinton de Kock.The explosive New Zealand duo of Allen and Seifert — who recently put together a record 117-run stand at Eden Gardens to eliminate South Africa in a T20 World Cup semifinal — are among the frontrunners.With Sunil Narine, who also opens, a certainty in the XI, choosing the remaining three overseas players from a pool that includes Green, Allen, Seifert, Ravindra and potentially Matheesha Pathirana presents another selection dilemma."I think that is a priority right now, making sure we get our combinations right. Because I always believe when you have new combinations in this IPL, it's about making sure you get your team peaking, yes, everyone in form, but positioning them well enough for them to succeed."So I think that as a group will be our first challenge and the rest we'll see as it comes," Nayar said.KKR’s middle-order struggles last season — where positions 4 to 8 failed to deliver consistently — remain a concern. However, Nayar emphasised that past performances will have little bearing on the upcoming campaign.He cited Sanju Samson as an example, pointing to how the wicketkeeper-batter overcame poor form before the T20 World Cup and went on to play crucial knocks in India’s title-winning run."We saw that with Sanju Samson in the World Cup as well. It's about being there at that moment in this tournament. So we're very hopeful that our players can start strong."And if you're in good form, it doesn't matter what your name is in this format of the game. I think form counts a lot more than what's happened in the past," he added."I've always believed T20 cricket is a game of momentum. It's a game of form. So what happened a year ago doesn't really matter as to what's going to happen."I think something that is going to be really important is the kind of form our boys hit this season. And if everyone is at the peak of their prowess, you expect this team to do really well like they did a year before last. So I honestly believe that it's not so much of what happened in the past," he said.
Article Summary: Young batter angkrish raghuvanshi gives kolkata knight riders a welcome selection headache. 21-year-old smashed unbeaten 103 off just 55 balls, an innings laced with nine fours and five sixes, at a strike rate of 187.27. His knock powered purple knights to a successful chase of 200 in 19.2 overs.

Article Title: Jonathan Brown Health Update: Jonathan Brown gives health update from hospital after brain tumour surgery as Brisbane Lions icon details sudden diagnosis
Article Text:
Jonathan Brown (Image Via Getty)

Jonathan Brown’s career, health struggles, and support from Garry Lyon and AFL community

Jonathan Brown, one of the most loved names in Australian football, is now recovering after brain tumour surgery. The former Brisbane Lions captain shared the news himself on Friday through a social media post. He posted a photo from his hospital bed, with a bandage on his head, while hugging his wife Kylie Brown. He confirmed that the surgery took place on Wednesday and said the result was positive.This news came as a surprise to many fans. Brown explained that the tumour was found during a routine scan, where doctors noticed a shadow on his brain. For now, he has asked for some quiet time to rest. In his own words, he said, “I understand a surgery of this nature creates interest and once I have recuperated, I will share my experience but for now I need to take some time to rest and recover.”Jonathan Brown’s journey in football has always been about strength and courage. He played 256 games for the Brisbane Lions and was part of three premiership-winning teams in 2001, 2002, and 2003. He also played in four straight grand finals, which shows how important he was for the team.During his career, Brown kicked 594 goals. He won the Coleman Medal in 2007, was named All-Australian twice, and also won the club’s best and fairest award three times.These achievements made him one of the top players of his time.However, his career also came with serious health concerns. Over 14 years, he suffered multiple head injuries. Because of this, he decided to retire in 2014. At that time, he clearly said his health was “not worth risking.”Now, after his recent surgery, many from the football world have shown support. Garry Lyon, who works with Brown on Fox Footy, spoke about him during Kayo Sports’ Friday Night Football.He said, “We’re throwing our thoughts out to one of our great mates.” He also shared that he spoke to Brown recently and added, “He was in the car and full of beans, bouncing around talking to Kylie and annoying her.”Lyon also added a warm message, saying, “So on behalf of all of us at Fox Footy and the broader footy community, there has been few more popular players than Jonathan Brown and few tougher. We send you our love, big fella. Take it easy, rest up, recuperate and we look forward to seeing your ugly mug back on here in the not too distant future.” Right now, the focus remains on Brown’s recovery, and early signs look positive.
Article Summary: Former brisbane lions captain jonathan brown has undergone brain surgery. The former all-australian and coleman medal winner revealed the news on friday. Garry lyon, who works with brown on fox footy, has shown support for him. Brown played 256 games for the brisbane lions and was part of three premiership-winning teams.

Article Title: Luana Carolina: What went wrong with Luana Carolina's weight cut as UFC London fight against Melissa Mullins gets suddenly canceled
Article Text:
What went wrong with Luana Carolina weight cut as UFC London fight against Melissa Mullins gets suddenly canceled (Image via Getty Images)

Luana Carolina’s weight miss against Melissa Mullins raises questions as Movsar Evloev and Lerone Murphy lead UFC London main card

Something unexpected happened at UFC London, and it changed the whole fight card. Luana Carolina and Melissa Mullins were set to face each other, but the fight was suddenly canceled. The reason was simple but serious, Carolina missed weight by a very big margin. This was supposed to be a 14-fight event, full of exciting matchups. But after the weigh-ins, things took a turn. Carolina came in at 144 lbs, which is 8 pounds over the bantamweight limit of 136 lbs. Because of this, officials had no choice but to cancel the fight for safety and rule reasons.At the same time, another fighter, Ravena Oliveira, also missed weight.She weighed 116.5 lbs, just half a pound over the strawweight limit. Her fight against Shanelle Dyer is still on, but she will lose part of her purse, as reported by MMA Junkie. Still, all the focus quickly shifted to Carolina because of how big her miss was. This moment has now reduced UFC London to 13 fights, leaving fans disappointed but still excited for the remaining bouts.This is not the first time Luana Carolina has had weight problems.In 2021, she missed weight against Poliana Botelho by 2.5 pounds. Then again in 2024, she came in 3 pounds over against Julija Stoliarenko. Now, this is her third miss, and the biggest one so far. She has struggled in both the 125 lbs and 135 lbs divisions. Last year, she even pulled out of a fight against Montana De La Rosa due to weight issues. So, this latest miss has raised serious concerns about her weight-cut process.On the other side, Melissa Mullins did everything right this time. She made weight perfectly at 136 lbs. Even though she had past issues against Nora Cornolle and Klaudia Syguła, she stayed on target for this fight. Now moving to the main card, things are still looking strong. The biggest fight features Movsar Evloev and Lerone Murphy, both undefeated fighters. Evloev weighed 146 lbs, while Murphy came in at 145 lbs.In the co-main event, Michael Aswell and Luke Riley also made weight without any issues at 145 lbs and 146 lbs. Another exciting fight includes Michael ‘Venom’ Page, who weighed 171 lbs, and Sam Patterson, who came in at 170 lbs. The rest of the card also stayed on track. Iwo Baraniewski (206 lbs) faces Austen Lane (205 lbs), while Roman Dolidze meets Christian Leroy Duncan, both at 186 lbs. Finally, Kurtis Campbell and Danny Silva both weighed 145 lbs.Even with one fight gone, UFC London still promises action. But the big question remains, will this last-minute change affect the overall excitement of the event?
Article Summary: Luana carolina’s weight miss against melissa mullins raises questions as movsar evloev and lerone murphy lead ufc london main card. Ufc london was supposed to be a 14-fight event, full of exciting matchups. But after the weigh-ins, things took a turn. Carolina came in at 144 lbs, which is 8 pounds over the bantamweight limit of 136 lbs.

Article Title: Maldives Speedboat Crash: Ace rally driver missing, Raymond MD Gautam Singhania injured in Maldives speedboat crash
Article Text:
Poll Would you participate in motorsport events after hearing about this accident? Yes, risk doesn't deter me No, I feel unsafe

CHANDIGARH: India's ace rally driver, Hari Singh, 59, is missing after a speedboat overturned in the Maldives on Thursday night. Gautam Singhania , chairman and managing director of Raymond Group, was injured in the accident but is safe.Hari's long-time friend Shashi Pal Singh Garcha, president of Chandigarh Motorsports Association, told TOI on Friday, "We still don't have any news about Hari and another person missing in the incident. Search operations were called off late Friday evening due to darkness."Singhania and Hari, a five-time Indian National Rally Championship winner, were among a group of seven on the speedboat when it overturned near Felidhoo, as per media reports.Singhania and the others were rescued but the search continues for Hari and the other missing person. Family and friends are praying for their safety."Gautam Singhania suffered minor injuries following an unfortunate accident. He is recovering under due care in Mumbai. We thank you for the wishes and pray for the well-being of the affected friends," said a spokesperson for the industrialist.Garcha, also a five-time national motocross champion, said they were keeping their fingers crossed."Manik Bhimsen Bhardwaj, from Bengaluru, who was also on the boat, suffered a severe injury and his arm had to be amputated," he said.News of the accident has shaken the motorsports fraternity. Delhi-based international rally driver Gaurav Gill visited Hari Singh's house in Sector 8, Chandigarh, on Friday evening.Rattan Dhillon, a rally driver from Chandigarh, posted on X: "How unfortunate… Mr Hari Singh sir, a true legend of Indian motorsport and closely associated with JK Tyre and Mercedes, has gone missing following a speedboat accident in the Maldives. It's been over 22 hours since rescue operations began, and the Indian Navy, along with Maldivian authorities, are continuing the search. Thankfully, 6-7 people on board, including Gautam Singhania, have been rescued safely. Hari Sir needs our prayers right now, hoping for his safe return!"Hari is the first Indian to win the Asia Zone Rally Championship, and is currently head of operations at JK Tyre Motorsport where he works on developing new racing and rallying talent across India. He is married and has two children.
Article Summary: India's ace rally driver, hari singh, 59, is missing after a speedboat overturned in the maldives. Gautam singhania, chairman and managing director of raymond group, was injured in the accident but is safe. Search operations were called off late friday evening due to darkness.

Article Title: Brittany Mahomes shares major injury update while Patrick Mahomes rehabs ACL tear
Article Text: Patrick Mahomes continues his ACL rehab with hopes of returning early in the season, while Brittany Mahomes shared a major personal milestone. After a past back injury, she revealed she can now lift weights pain-free. As Mahomes leans on family support, Brittany’s recovery highlights resilience, with both navigating injuries and progress together during a challenging period.

Article Title: "He has finally healed”: Kai Cenat’s rare public appearance leaves fans concerned and curious
Article Text:
Kai Cenat made a rare public appearance during his streaming hiatus at IShowSpeed’s Baller League event, sparking emotional reactions online. Fans debated whether his recent breakup changed him or if he has healed. The viral moment, featuring warm interactions with Speed’s family, reignited excitement, with many hoping the popular streamer is preparing for a full return.

Kai Cenat’s quiet return sparks emotional reactions as fans read between the lines





Kai Cenat's surprise appearance at a big livestream event has caused a lot of people to feel strongly about it online. The well-known streamer was seen backstage at the Baller League after being out of the public eye for weeks. He was having a nice time with IShowSpeed's family. The video spread quickly, not because of the drama, but because of what it meant. For a lot of fans, it felt like they were getting a rare look at a creator slowly finding his way back.There was a lot of meaning in that moment. Cenat didn't say much, but just being there made the story. People who watched him noticed small changes in his energy and behavior. Some people felt pain that wouldn't go away, while others saw growth.The internet paid attention either way, turning a short interaction into a widely talked-about event that blurred the line between public and private life.Reactions flooded social media within hours. One comment captured the mood bluntly: "That heart break took something from this man," while another offered a more hopeful take, "He has finally healed from his breakup." A different user framed the return as a turning point, writing, "The legend Kai Cent appears once again but much stronger this time."The emotional tone only deepened as fans reflected on the interaction itself. One viewer shared, "That moment felt bigger than just a stream. Seeing Kai Cenat back after months away, reconnecting with IShowSpeed and his family, it really hit different. You could feel the genuine energy and love through the screen. This is the kind of content people actually miss when creators take a break."Another added, "Kai Cenat returning after months with IShowSpeed and family proves their chemistry remains unmatched. The chaotic energy hit instantly. Streaming has been missing this exact vibe recently."Optimism continued to grow, with one fan stating, "Kai Cenat is back, bringing the energy with IShowSpeed and family vibes livestreams just got a whole lot wilder!"The reason for these reactions goes back to Cenat's breakup with Gabrielle "Gigi" Alayah in late 2025. He confirmed it simply, writing, "I'm single I will never be in another relationship again."Gigi later responded, saying, "I left, now you wanna get on the internet and rush to paint a false narrative about me off a FAKE Twitter post is insane. I've never cheated on him, and YOU know that. I have never dealt with that man... play that sympathetic role somewhere else, pls."For now, Cenat remains on hiatus. But if this brief appearance is any sign, his return may not be far away.
Article Summary: Kai cenat made a rare public appearance at ishowspeed's baller league event. Fans debated whether his recent breakup changed him or if he has healed. The viral moment reignited excitement, with many hoping the popular streamer is preparing for a full return.

Article Title: 'Iss baar No. 6': Rohit Sharma's big promise to Mumbai Indians fans - WATCH
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Watch Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory Shashi Tharoor & Samson’s Redemption Story: From Setbacks to Glory

NEW DELHI: The crowd erupted in loud cheers the moment Rohit Sharma took the mic, with the noise reaching a crescendo when he declared, 'iss baar No. 6 aapke paas'. Mumbai Indians are five-time Indian Premier League champions, having lifted the trophy in 2013, 2015, 2017, 2019 and 2020. However, Mumbai Indians have not won the title in the last five years. Notably, all five championships came under Rohit’s leadership.Rohit, who was addressing fans at a Mumbai Indians event — MI Mix — held at the Jio World Garden on Saturday, was joined by Suryakumar Yadav and Hardik Pandya.“I want to thank you all on my team’s behalf. Keep supporting us like you do every year. We love it. And in return, we will try to make it [title] number 6.Iss baar Number 6 aapke paas laakar rakhein," Rohit said.Are Mumbai Indians the greatest IPL team?Former India cricketer Irfan Pathan believes Mumbai Indians hold a slight edge over Chennai Super Kings as the ‘greatest team in IPL history’, even though both franchises have won the same number of titles.Pathan argued that MI’s impact on Indian cricket has been more significant, highlighting the number of top-quality players the franchise has produced for the national team.“CSK started winning the IPL title from 2010 onwards. They won back-to-back titles in 2010 and 2011 and were the first team to do so. But when Mumbai Indians started winning from 2013, they kept winning after every alternate year. Then they won the IPL trophy back-to-back in 2019 and 2020.”“What I like about Mumbai is their contribution to Indian cricket. The number of match winners they have produced for the Indian team is absolutely tremendous. How do you achieve that? First, you make your franchise big. Second, you deliver results with the team you have. Even now, Mumbai Indians had a great squad last season that could have easily won the trophy, but they couldn’t for different reasons.”While MI can take credit for identifying and nurturing talents like Jasprit Bumrah , Hardik Pandya, Ishan Kishan and Tilak Varma, CSK can point to their role in developing players such as Ravichandran Ashwin, Murali Vijay and Ruturaj Gaikwad.“CSK don’t have four Indian captains, Mumbai Indians do. In that respect, assembling a team and contributing to a bigger cause, I think Mumbai Indians are the greatest IPL team. I know CSK will always say they are also the greatest, having won five trophies too. There is no doubt. There will always be a debate and it is a fair debate. But I think Mumbai Indians take the edge because they have given so many wonderful cricketers and young talents to Indian cricket,” Pathan concluded.
Article Summary: Mumbai indians are five-time indian premier league champions. Rohit sharma was addressing fans at a mumbai indians event on saturday. Irfan pathan believes mumbai indians hold a slight edge over chennai super kings as the 'greatest team in ipl history'

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: IPL Tickets Online: How to book IPL 2026 tickets online and offline, full IPL match schedule and other details
Article Text:
IPL 2026

IPL 2026 opening match



IPL 2026: Phase 1 schedule and double headers



Bengaluru

The phase will feature four double-headers, with afternoon matches starting at 3:30 PM IST and evening matches beginning at 7:30 PM IST. The first double-header of IPL 2026 takes place on April 4, when Delhi Capitals host Mumbai Indians at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi in the afternoon It will be followed by Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad in the evening.

IPL 2026 home venues: Who is playing where



Royal Challengers Bengaluru will play five home matches in Bengaluru and two in Raipur.

Punjab Kings (PBKS) will host four matches at the PCA Stadium in New Chandigarh and three in Dharamshala.

Rajasthan Royals will begin their home campaign in Guwahati, where they will host Chennai Super Kings and Mumbai Indians. They will play four matches in Jaipur.

How to book IPL 2026 tickets online



Visit BookMyShow (bookmyshow.com), the District app (by Zomato), or your team's official website.

Search for the IPL 2026 match you want to attend using the date or team name.

Select your preferred seating category.

Choose your specific seats using the interactive stadium map.

Add the tickets to your cart and proceed to checkout.

Complete payment using a credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, or digital wallet.

The ticket will be sent to your registered email address or mobile number.

How to buy IPL 2026 tickets offline



Visit the nearest authorised ticket counter at the stadium or a designated retail outlet. Locations are typically announced on the team’s official website and social media closer to the match.

Check availability for your preferred match and seating category at the counter.

Carry a valid photo ID — an Aadhaar card, PAN card, or passport will be accepted.

Choose your seats and confirm your selection with the ticketing staff.

Make your payment — cash, card, and digital wallets are generally accepted at most venues.

Collect your ticket on the spot after the transaction is complete.

Article Title: Xbox Game Pass March 2026: 10 best games you should download today
Article Text:
Source: Xbox

Xbox Game Pass: 10 best games for March 2026



Cyberpunk 2077





Kingdom Come: Deliverance II



The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt



Diablo II: Resurrected



Mio: Memories in Orbit



Resident Evil Village



Little Nightmares



Assassin’s Creed IV: Black Flag



Dome Keeper



Marvel Cosmic Invasion



Xbox Game Pass in March 2026 feels unusually packed, even by its own standards. The service continues to bring together a mix of big-budget releases and smaller, creative titles, giving players plenty to choose from without needing to buy each game individually. Some games demand dozens of hours, while others offer quick but memorable experiences. It includes various types of games, from role-playing to action-oriented titles and quiet games. Therefore, the variety of the catalogue is wide-ranging. GameRant has created a list of ten games currently included in Xbox Game Pass.From deep role-playing adventures to fast-paced action and atmospheric indie titles, the variety is wide.GameRant has curated a list of the 10 best games on Xbox Game Pass for March 2026 below.Xbox Game Pass offers an exciting March 2026 lineup, featuring 10 must-play games packed with adventure, action, and endless entertainment.Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world action RPG developed by CD Projekt Red. The setting of this game is Night City, which is a fictional city in a dystopian world that is highly technological and corporate-dominated.The gamers will be playing as V, a character in this world, and V is a mercenary with abilities that can be customized in terms of appearance and skills. The gameplay is in first-person mode and has elements of combat involving guns and hacking.Kingdom Come: Deliverance II is a role-playing game that takes place in a medieval world where historical settings are used. The player assumes the role of a character named Henry who evolves depending on the actions of the player. It has a first-person perspective and realistic systems/settings.Skills like fighting, talking, and crafting progress over time depending on usage. It has a branching quest system where player choices affect character relationships.The game is an open-world RPG, and in it, a person gets to play as a character named Geralt of Rivia, who is a monster hunter. In the game, there are various locations to explore, and they are further divided into different areas. The storyline of the game is based on the search for Ciri.In the game, sword fighting and magic spells, called Signs, are used for fighting enemies, and players get a chance to prepare in advance by creating potions and equipment.Diablo II Resurrected is a remastered version of the original Diablo II, maintaining its original gameplay systems but improving its visuals. It is an action RPG in which players select from various character classes, each with its unique abilities and development paths.Players progress through various acts in the game, each containing various quests, locations, and enemies. The gameplay is in real-time and is based on fighting enemies and killing them for loot such as weapons, armor, and magical equipment.Mio: Memories in Orbit is a side-scrolling action-adventure game of Metroidvania style. The gameplay involves an android character exploring a damaged spacecraft. The gameplay requires players to unlock abilities that grant access to new areas.Gameplay: The gameplay features various elements of platforms, such as jumping and climbing, and movement-based challenges. The gameplay also features fighting against robots and bosses.Resident Evil Village is a survival horror video game developed by Capcom and is played from a first-person perspective. The player takes on the role of Ethan Winters as he searches for his daughter in a remote village. The game takes place in various locations such as houses, castles, and underground regions, all of which are connected by a central structure.The gameplay consists of exploration, puzzle-solving, and combat against various types of enemies. The player must manage resources such as ammunition, health, and inventory. The player can upgrade weapons by using a merchant.Little Nightmares is a puzzle-platformer where players control a character known as Six. The gameplay is based on moving through spaces filled with challenges and enemies. The gameplay is more oriented toward stealth and interaction with objects.The gameplay is based on solving puzzles by moving objects, jumping, and avoiding enemies. There is also a chase element where players have to escape from enemies. The levels have unique challenges.Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag is an action-adventure game set in the Caribbean in the early 18th century. The player takes on the character of Edward Kenway, a pirate associated with Assassin's Creed.On land, Assassin's Creed IV will feature elements of stealth, fighting, and story-based missions. Other elements will include exploration and optional objectives. The game will feature real-world and fictional elements.Dome Keeper is a type of resource management and defence game where players defend a dome from enemy attacks. The gameplay is divided into two phases, one for mining resources underground and another for defending the dome above ground.Players dig tunnels and collect resources for upgrading weapons, shields, and movements. During the attack phase, players defend using defence systems against enemies.Marvel Cosmic Invasion is a side-scrolling beat-em-up game based on Marvel Comics characters. There are different playable characters in the game, each with different fighting styles.The gameplay of Marvel Cosmic Invasion includes moving through levels and fighting groups of enemies. There is an option to switch between two selected characters during gameplay.

From role-playing adventures to fast-paced action and atmospheric indie titles, the variety is wide.

Article Title: Xbox Game Pass Kiln release date is April 23: Experience chaotic pottery battles, team strategy, and physics-based multiplayer combat
Article Text:
PC: Xbox Wire

Xbox’s Kiln brings pottery battles to multiplayer matches

Game Pass allows players to jump into Kiln

Poll What factor makes you most interested in trying Kiln? The innovative gameplay mechanics. Double Fine's reputation.

Early access and what players can expect

The next addition to Xbox Game Pass is beginning to take shape, and it looks quite different from the usual lineup. Kiln, the latest title from Double Fine Productions, is now confirmed to launch on April 23, 2026 according to official Xbox Wire. Fans around the world are eagerly anticipating this unique, creative, and visually stunning game experience, promising hours of engaging gameplay and imaginative storytelling. It will be available on Game Pass on the same day.This “day one” release approach has become fairly common since Microsoft acquired the studio in 2019, and Kiln appears to follow that pattern.Kiln does not resemble a typical fighting game in any conventional sense.Players create pottery vessels, which serve as their in-game characters. These designs directly influence gameplay by shaping stats and abilities during matches.The matches revolve around a mode called Quench, where teams of four players compete against each other. The objective is to carry water to the opposing team’s kiln and extinguish the fire. This may sound simple, but the gameplay appears to be quite chaotic, as vessels collide, break, and disrupt each other using physics-based combat.Kiln reportedly began as an internal experiment at Double Fine around 2017. It started as a small and rough concept before gradually evolving into a full project. This extended development period appears to have allowed the idea to mature, even though it remains unconventional.Since becoming part of Microsoft, Double Fine has consistently released its titles directly onto Game Pass. Psychonauts 2 followed this approach, as did Keeper. Kiln continues this same strategy.For players, this approach reduces the barrier to entry, as there is no need for an upfront purchase. Instead, players can simply download the game and try it.Before its official release, Kiln is scheduled to run a series of playtests. An open beta is expected to take place from April 9 to April 11. These early sessions appear to be focused on PC players, most likely through Steam. The full release will be available across multiple platforms, including Xbox Series X and Series S, PlayStation 5, and PC, confirms Xbox Wire.
Article Summary: Kiln is the latest title from double fine productions. It will launch on april 23, 2026 according to official xbox wire. Players create pottery vessels, which serve as their in-game characters. These designs influence gameplay by shaping stats and abilities during matches.

Article Title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Showdown update brings new battle pass and more: Everything that’s changing in the game
Article Text:
Image credit: Epic Games

Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 Showdown update: Everything that’s new



Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 update, titled “Showdown”, is now live. This new update has rolled out with a refreshed battle pass, new gameplay systems, map changes, and an updated loot pool. The update introduces a season-long conflict between the Ice King and The Foundation, along with new mechanics such as Rivalries and player-controlled Battle Bus routes.The new season also brings eight fresh battle pass skins, including Bugs Bunny as the tier 100 reward and The Foundation (Reforged), featuring the likeness of Dwayne “The Foundation” Johnson. Players who purchase the pass will be able to instantly unlock the Ice King skin, while additional cosmetics, including pickaxes, gliders, and a sidekick, can be earned through progression. Here’s everything that’s new in the latest Fortnite update:Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 follows a longer-than-usual first season and introduces multiple changes aimed at reshaping gameplay progression, player interaction, and seasonal events.With the latest update, players can use in-game Rivalry Screens to mark opponents as targets during a match. A unique currency that can be used to unlock more loot is awarded for defeating opponents, but players who interact with the system frequently may also be targeted more frequently.Players can select between Team Ice King and Team Foundation in the season's main "Showdown" event. Weekly challenges are used to monitor progress, and participation is rewarded with cosmetics.Owners of battle passes will receive a bonus style for the team that defeats more opponents by the end of the season. Players must complete 50 eliminations in the first week's challenge in order to receive a cosmetic reward.Epic Games has also introduced a limited-time early purchase bonus. Players who buy the battle pass before March 27 will receive the Stealth Tech style for The Foundation (Reforged) and related cosmetics.The update also brings major changes to the loot pool, with most weapons from Season 1 removed. Only the Iron Pump and Twin Hammer shotguns return, while new additions include the Vector 7 DMR, Chaos Reloader Shotgun, and Bouncing Boomstick explosive. Some older weapons, such as the Nemesis AR and Thunder Burst SMG, are also included.New movement items have been added, replacing Shockwave Grenades. The Overdrive Grenade launches players into the air and provides a temporary speed boost, though it can cause fall damage. The Skyline Deployer allows players to create ziplines between surfaces or attach them to floating objects.Four locations on the map have also been replaced with new named areas. Bumpy Bay is now Squibbly Shores, Clawsy Lodge has become Frigid Fortress, Classified Canyon has been reworked into New Sanctuary, and Lethal Labs is now Dark Dominion.Another gameplay addition allows a randomly selected player in each match to control the Battle Bus route, introducing a new layer of strategy at the start of each round.
Article Summary: Fortnite chapter 7 season 2 update, titled ‘showdown’, is now live. This new update has rolled out with a refreshed battle pass, new gameplay systems, map changes, and an updated loot pool. The update introduces a season-long conflict between the ice king and the foundation.

Article Title: BGMI 4.3 update: Krafton collaborates with CSK and KKR for IPL 2026; check team-themed skins, vehicles, and first-ever photo booths
Article Text:
Source: Krafton BGMI

BGMI collaborates with CSK and KKR for new interactive in-game features



CSK on 21 March 2026

KKR on 25 March 2026

BGMI 4.3 adds CSK and KKR team-themed content for in-game fan engagement



BGMI and CSK collaboration (21 March 2026)



BGMI and KKR collaboration (25 March 2026)



BGMI 4.3 update: Other key features



Jujutsu Kaisen collaboration – Mini RP and Lucky Spin events based on the popular anime series worldwide.

Apollo Sportscar collaboration – Speed Drift addition for BGMI players to experience high-performance racing thrills in-game.

Phoenixtra X-Suit – Another high-end addition to BGMI’s exclusive elite-tier cosmetics.

Dark Raven X-Suit – Another fan favourite from the community, ideal for collectors and long-time players.

Ancient secret rise theme mode – One of the most cherished themed game experiences in BGMI, offering unique locations and combat for community and creator engagement.

How to download the BGMI 4.3 update



Step 1: Search ‘Bgminewupdate.com.in’ online.

Step 2: Open the website and look for the BGMI download page.

Step 3: Download both the APK and OBB files.

Step 4: Enable the “Unknown sources” option in your device settings to allow installation from external sources.

Step 5: Check the downloaded APK file on your device and start the installation process.

Step 6: After installation, move the OBB file to the following directory: Android > OBB > com.pubg.imobile.

Step 7: If the “com.pubg.imobile” folder is not present, create it manually and place the OBB file within it.

Step 8: Open the application, log in, and proceed to play the game.

In‑game content activation



CSK content becomes available starting March 21, 2026.

KKR content becomes available starting March 25, 2026.

Open the game, and check the Event or Store section to claim themed outfits, vehicle skins, and access Photo Booth POIs.

The BGMI 4.3 update is set to introduce dedicated content tied to the Indian Premier League 2026 season. According to BGMI maker Krafton, Chennai Super Kings‑themed items and Kolkata Knight Riders content are scheduled to go live in the game on March 21 and March 25, respectively. Krafton India has partnered with two of the IPL’s most prominent franchises to deliver branded collectables, exclusive vehicle skins, special outfits, and exciting new interactive in‑game elements. These additions extend beyond cosmetic changes and are carefully designed to offer fans a highly immersive, engaging, and authentic way to celebrate and support their preferred teams within the BGMI environment.The release schedule and pattern of the BGMI 4.3 update imply a strategic attempt to incorporate sports franchise brand identities into a mobile gaming environment. By releasing team-themed material on specific datesThis update is in line with the IPL schedule and positions BGMI as a competitive environment and a space for fan engagement.This integration of franchise brand identities includes a variety of new interactive features such as branded collectables and Photo Booth POIs, in addition to retaining the fundamental battle royale game mechanics.For supporters of Chennai Super Kings (CSK), the battleground will receive its initial themed content on 21 March 2026. According to Krafton, the update includes two team‑branded items: the Thala Legacy Set outfit and the Thala Monster Truck vehicle skin. These items carry visual design cues tied directly to CSK’s identity and are available to players across BGMI’s core maps.Introduced alongside these cosmetic features are the first‑ever Photo Booth Points of Interest (POIs) in BGMI. These POIs appear at specific locations on the Erangel and Livik maps. When players approach a Photo Booth POI, they can view and capture in‑game photographs that include virtual representations of CSK players.Seddharth Merrotra, Head of Business Development at KRAFTON India, commented on the CSK collaboration, noting that the intention was to merge CSK’s fan passion with BGMI’s active player base in a way that feels meaningful. KS Viswanathan, Managing Director of CSK, described the update as a new method for supporters to celebrate their team through digital engagement rather than conventional broadcast or stadium‑centric experiences.From 25 March 2026, Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR)‑themed content becomes available within BGMI. The KKR rollout includes the Knight Dominion Set outfit and the Eden Charge Buggy vehicle skin. Similar to the CSK content, these items reflect KKR’s visual motifs and are usable across standard gameplay modes.KKR also receives dedicated Photo Booth POIs for Erangel and Livik. These POIs function identically to the CSK versions, enabling players to take in‑game photos that incorporate static virtual imagery associated with the KKR franchise. The presence of these points is intended to provide fans with additional avenues for team expression within the game’s interactive world.Binda Dey, Chief Marketing Officer at Knight Riders Sports, stated that this collaboration aims to extend the connection fans have with the KKR brand into a digital format.The 4.3 update is released through official platforms only:
Article Summary: Bgmi 4.3 adds csk and kkr team-themed content for in-game fan engagement. Krafton india has partnered with two of the ipl’s most prominent franchises to deliver branded collectables, exclusive vehicle skins, special outfits, and exciting new interactive in‑game elements.

Article Title: God of War: Sons of Sparta review: A 2D God of War that actually feels like God of War
Article Text:
A retro indie studio delivers "Sons of Sparta," a surprisingly deep 2D Metroidvania starring young Kratos. Its combat, featuring spear and shield with intricate upgrades, shines, especially in challenging boss encounters. While the narrative framing is effective, the main plot feels underdeveloped.

Spear, shield, and surprisingly deep combat

A good story that doesn't quite go far enough

Ten hours well spent

Our rating: 3/5

Sons of Sparta is a 2D Metroidvania about teenage Kratos. It's made by a retro indie studio. And honestly? It's pretty great—not in a "great for what it is" way, but genuinely great in ways that caught me off guard. It's shorter, smaller, and quieter than anything else in the God of War catalogue, and it doesn't pretend otherwise. If you go in knowing that, you'll have a good time.Combat is where Sons of Sparta does its best work. Kratos fights with a spear and shield the whole way through, but the system layered around those two weapons has real depth. Shafts change your combo-enders, tips add passive effects and unlock active abilities, pommels give you big special attacks.Then the divine boons stack on top—Apollo's sling, Hestia's arcing fire, a ricocheting hook—each one useful in combat and doubling as a key to unlock parts of the map. It all clicks together in a satisfying way.The boss fights are the highlight by a mile. These are proper pattern-recognition encounters with long attack chains, and the later ones are genuinely demanding. Dying a few times, slowly reading the rhythm, and then finally running it clean—that loop is endlessly satisfying.Some of the best fights the franchise has seen, honestly.Movement is fun too. The map is dense, vertical, and well-designed—every area looks and feels different, from a fiery foundry to a fog-thick bog to a frozen wasteland that literally slows you down until you light pyres. Backtracking with new abilities rarely feels like a chore because the world is interesting enough to revisit.The narrative frames itself as Kratos telling his daughter Calliope a story from his youth—and that device works really well. It explains the lighter, almost fable-like tone, and the Calliope scenes have a warmth that's easy to like. Young Kratos is pious, stubborn, occasionally funny, and spending time with him makes Ghost of Sparta hit harder once the credits roll. The brotherly dynamic with Deimos is the emotional core, and it earns its moments.The main plot—tracking down a missing cadet across several locations—doesn't have much momentum though. It meanders. A character named Lydandra feels set up for something that never arrives. The lore threads that franchise fans will be watching for mostly go unexplored. It's not bad writing, it just doesn't go far enough—and for a game sitting at the very beginning of Kratos' story, that's a little frustrating.Around 10 hours for the main story, more if you chase post-game content—and there's enough of it to keep completionists busy well beyond that. Terrence C. Carson returning as the original Kratos voice is a nice touch that the game uses well. The pixel art is gorgeous. The DualSense feedback during combat is punchy in all the right ways.Sons of Sparta won't shake up the Metroidvania genre and it isn't trying to. But it's a focused, fun game with combat that has more going on than one would expect and boss fights worth talking about. Franchise fans should just buy it. Everyone else—if a 10-hour 2D action game with great fights and a decent story sounds appealing, this is exactly that.
Article Summary: A retro indie studio delivers "sons of sparta," a surprisingly deep 2d metroidvania starring young kratos. Its combat, featuring spear and shield with intricate upgrades, shines, especially in challenging boss encounters. While the narrative framing is effective, the main plot feels underdeveloped.

Five-time champions Chennai Super Kings are heading into IPL 2026 with a refreshed squad, bold decisions, and a clear shift toward the future. Under the leadership of Ruturaj Gaikwad, CSK have built a well-balanced unit featuring explosive batters, promising youngsters, and a versatile bowling attack.However, the team has suffered a significant setback ahead of the season, with Nathan Ellis ruled out due to a hamstring injury. Ellis was expected to spearhead CSK’s death bowling, and his absence will force the team to rethink their bowling combinations.Adding to the intrigue, CSK pulled off a blockbuster trade, bringing in Sanju Samson from Rajasthan Royals in exchange for Ravindra Jadeja and Sam Curran.Here is the CSK's strongest predicted playing XI for IPL 2026:CSK’s opening combination could feature young sensation Ayush Mhatre alongside Sanju Samson.Mhatre, the ICC U19 World Cup-winning captain, impressed during his debut season who came as a replacement of Gaikwad and has been retained as a long-term prospect. His aggressive yet composed approach makes him a strong candidate to open.Samson after a successful ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 campaign where he played a key role in India’s triumph and won the Player of the Tournament award, brings experience and class at the top.His presence instantly elevates CSK’s batting strength.At No. 3, skipper Ruturaj Gaikwad returns fully fit after missing IPL 2025 in mid season due to an elbow injury. Gaikwad will anchor the innings and provide stability.CSK’s middle order reflects a clear transition phase. Kartik Sharma, a 19-year-old wicketkeeper-batter signed for a massive Rs 14.20 crore, is seen as the long-term successor to MS Dhoni. Likely to bat at No. 4, Sharma carries high expectations as a future finisher. However Sarfaraz Khan is proven batter in the IPL and it will be interesting to see what CSK management decides.Last year, CSK’s middle order received a dynamic boost mid-tournament through Dewald Brevis’ aggressive stroke play. This season, he will feature from the start, adding strength at No. 5.At No. 6, Shivam Dube continues to be CSK’s trusted finisher. His recent performances for India in T20 World Cup, especially in pressure situations, underline his importance in the lower middle order.One of the biggest talking points is Prashant Veer, the 20-year-old all-rounder from Uttar Pradesh, signed for Rs 14.20 crore. Seen as a direct replacement for Jadeja, Veer offers a similar skillset with left-handed power hitting and left-arm spin, giving CSK balance in both departments.The absence of Nathan Ellis leaves a significant gap in the death overs. To compensate, CSK are likely to rely Matt Henry, who will lead the pace attack, especially in the powerplay, where his discipline and swing can be crucial. Although CSK might look for a replacement of Nathan Ellis ahead of IPL 2026 as Matt Henry is much more a powerplay bowler.While Matt Henry is a world-class new-ball bowler, his IPL economy at the backend has historically been high. To support him, CSK might rely more heavily on Jamie Overton to provide extra pace and bounce along with his lower order batting.Spin duties will be handled by Noor Ahmad, who impressed last season. He was a key signing for Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in IPL 2025, bought for Rs 10 crore to serve as their premier left-arm wrist-spinner. He made an immediate impact, notably taking 4/18 against Mumbai Indians on his debut.Meanwhile, Khaleel Ahmed adds variety as a left-arm pacer, capable of swinging the ball upfront and providing early breakthroughs.Even at 44, MS Dhoni remains central to CSK’s identity. While his role continues to evolve, he is expected to feature as an Impact Player, finisher, and mentor. CSK management has confirmed his availability for the entire season, with his exact role to be decided by the coaching staff led by Stephen Fleming.
Article Summary: Csk have built a well-balanced unit featuring explosive batters, promising youngsters, and a versatile bowling attack. Csk pulled off a blockbuster trade, bringing in sanju samson from rajasthan royals in exchange for ravindra jadeja and sam curran. Nathan ellis was expected to spearhead csk’s death bowling.
